mapper.update: UPDATE spc_alarm_event SET END_TIME = #{endTime}, DURATION_SECONDS = #{durationSeconds}, POINT_COUNT = #{pointCount}, MAX_VALUE = #{maxValue}, MAX_VALUE_TIME = #{maxValueTime}, MIN_VALUE = #{minValue}, MIN_VALUE_TIME = #{minValueTime}, AVG_VALUE = #{avgValue}, FIRST_VALUE = #{firstValue}, FIRST_VALUE_TIME = #{firstValueTime}, LAST_VALUE = #{lastValue}, LAST_VALUE_TIME = #{lastValueTime}, END_VALUE = #{endValue}, END_VALUE_TIME = #{endValueTime}, PEEK_VALUE = #{peekValue}, PEEK_VALUE_TIME = #{peekTime}, STATUS = 'RESOLVED', UPDATE_TIME = NOW() WHERE segment_id = #{segmentId}

UPDATE spc_alarm_event SET POINT_COUNT = #{pointCount}, MAX_VALUE = #{maxValue}, MAX_VALUE_TIME = #{maxValueTime}, MIN_VALUE = #{minValue}, MIN_VALUE_TIME = #{minValueTime}, AVG_VALUE = #{avgValue}, FIRST_VALUE = #{firstValue}, FIRST_VALUE_TIME = #{firstValueTime}, LAST_VALUE = #{lastValue}, LAST_VALUE_TIME = #{lastValueTime}, SEVERITY_LEVEL = #{severityLevel}, PEEK_VALUE = #{peekValue}, PEEK_VALUE_TIME = #{peekTime},
OOS = 1, OOW = 0, OOC = 0, OO3 = 0,
OOS = 0, OOW = 1, OOC = 0, OO3 = 0,
OOS = 0, OOW = 0, OOC = 1, OO3 = 0,
OOS = 0, OOW = 0, OOC = 0, OO3 = 1,
UPDATE_TIME = NOW() WHERE SEGMENT_ID = #{segmentId}
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM spc_alarm_event WHERE 1=1
AND JOB_ID IN
#{jid}
AND PEEK_VALUE_TIME >= #{startTime}
AND PEEK_VALUE_TIME <= #{endTime}
AND OOS = true
AND OOW = true
AND OOC = true
AND OO3 = true
AND NORMAL = true
ORDER BY START_TIME DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE spc_alarm_event SET first_value = #{firstValue}, first_value_time = #{firstValueTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE segment_id = #{segmentId}
UPDATE spc_alarm_event SET last_value = #{lastValue}, last_value_time = #{lastValueTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE segment_id = #{segmentId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_events, COUNT(CASE WHEN ae.status = 'ACTIVE' THEN 1 END) AS active_events, COUNT(CASE WHEN ae.status = 'RESOLVED' THEN 1 END) AS resolved_events, COUNT(CASE WHEN ae.oos = 1 THEN 1 END) AS oos_events, COUNT(CASE WHEN ae.oow = 1 THEN 1 END) AS oow_events, COUNT(CASE WHEN ae.ooc = 1 THEN 1 END) AS ooc_events, COUNT(CASE WHEN ae.oo3 = 1 THEN 1 END) AS oo3_events, COUNT(CASE WHEN ae.severity_level = 'HIGH' THEN 1 END) AS high_severity_events, COUNT(CASE WHEN ae.severity_level = 'MEDIUM' THEN 1 END) AS medium_severity_events, COUNT(CASE WHEN ae.severity_level = 'LOW' THEN 1 END) AS low_severity_events, ROUND(AVG(ae.duration_seconds), 2) AS avg_duration_seconds, MAX(ae.duration_seconds) AS max_duration_seconds, MIN(ae.duration_seconds) AS min_duration_seconds, ROUND(AVG(ae.point_count), 2) AS avg_point_count, MAX(ae.point_count) AS max_point_count, SUM(ae.point_count) AS total_abnormal_points, COUNT(CASE WHEN ae.first_value IS NOT NULL AND ae.last_value IS NOT NULL AND ae.last_value > ae.first_value THEN 1 END) AS increasing_events, COUNT(CASE WHEN ae.first_value IS NOT NULL AND ae.last_value IS NOT NULL AND ae.last_value < ae.first_value THEN 1 END) AS decreasing_events, COUNT(CASE WHEN ae.first_value IS NOT NULL AND ae.last_value IS NOT NULL AND ae.last_value = ae.first_value THEN 1 END) AS stable_events, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN ae.first_value IS NOT NULL AND ae.last_value IS NOT NULL THEN ae.last_value - ae.first_value END), 3) AS avg_value_change, MIN(ae.start_time) AS earliest_alarm, MAX(ae.start_time) AS latest_alarm FROM spc_alarm_event ae WHERE ae.start_time >= #{startTime} AND ae.start_time <= #{endTime}

SELECT ae.indicator_name, ae.point, COUNT(*) AS event_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN ae.status = 'ACTIVE' THEN 1 END) AS active_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN ae.oos = 1 THEN 1 END) AS oos_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN ae.oow = 1 THEN 1 END) AS oow_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN ae.ooc = 1 THEN 1 END) AS ooc_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN ae.oo3 = 1 THEN 1 END) AS oo3_count, ROUND(AVG(ae.duration_seconds), 2) AS avg_duration, MAX(ae.duration_seconds) AS max_duration, SUM(ae.point_count) AS total_abnormal_points, ROUND(AVG(ae.point_count), 2) AS avg_abnormal_points, ROUND(AVG(ae.first_value), 3) AS avg_first_value, ROUND(AVG(ae.last_value), 3) AS avg_last_value, ROUND(AVG(ae.max_value), 3) AS avg_max_value, ROUND(AVG(ae.min_value), 3) AS avg_min_value, MIN(ae.start_time) AS first_alarm_time, MAX(ae.start_time) AS last_alarm_time FROM spc_alarm_event ae WHERE ae.start_time >= #{startTime} AND ae.start_time <= #{endTime} GROUP BY ae.indicator_name, ae.point ORDER BY event_count DESC, avg_duration DESC

SELECT DATE(ae.start_time) AS alarm_date, COUNT(*) AS daily_event_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN ae.status = 'ACTIVE' THEN 1 END) AS active_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN ae.oos = 1 THEN 1 END) AS oos_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN ae.oow = 1 THEN 1 END) AS oow_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN ae.ooc = 1 THEN 1 END) AS ooc_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN ae.oo3 = 1 THEN 1 END) AS oo3_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN ae.severity_level = 'HIGH' THEN 1 END) AS high_severity_count, ROUND(AVG(ae.duration_seconds), 2) AS avg_duration, SUM(ae.point_count) AS total_abnormal_points, COUNT(DISTINCT ae.indicator_name) AS affected_indicators, COUNT(DISTINCT ae.point) AS affected_points FROM spc_alarm_event ae WHERE ae.start_time >= #{startTime} AND ae.start_time <= #{endTime} GROUP BY DATE(ae.start_time) ORDER BY alarm_date DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE spc_alarm_event SET severity_level = #{severityLevel}, ooc = #{ooc}, oos = #{oos}, oow = #{oow}, oo3 = #{oo3}, update_time = NOW() WHERE segment_id = #{segmentId}
